message:
docs: update ambient authority findings, verification evidence, and allowlist spec

- artifacts/10.15/ambient_authority_findings.json: expanded finding
  entries with additional ambient authority audit results from the
  latest bd-721z verification pass.
- artifacts/section_10_15/bd-721z/verification_evidence.json: added
  new witness entries and updated timestamps for the bd-721z
  truthfulness gate evidence pack.
- artifacts/section_10_15/bd-721z/verification_summary.md: updated
  summary narrative to reflect the expanded evidence coverage.
- docs/specs/ambient_authority_allowlist.toml: added new allowlist
  entries for recently audited ambient authority call sites.
- .beads/issues.jsonl: updated bead status tracking entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
